resources.string: University Management App is a comprehensive platform for managing university notices, faculty information, and educational resources for students and administrators.

This application provides a centralized system for university operations including notice management, faculty directory, eBook library, and student-admin communication. It enables administrators to upload notices and manage faculty records while providing students easy access to academic resources and organizational information.
There are a maximum of 48 Academic Council members.
There are a maximum of 96 Administration Committee members.
There are a maximum of 48 Senate members.
Represents the various academic departments and divisions of the university.
